projects.name: App Launcher
projects.description: recreation of chrome 48's App Launcher feature which was later discontinued and then remade by me in 2024/2025 with electron

projects.name: SHIT VIEWER
projects.description: joke app made because of https://github.com/Red-Killer/shit and made in electron. you can view past readme's of said repo, i guess.

projects.name: the news
projects.description: a windows 10/11 notification tester with silly UWP ui and notifications! theres also a Win32 cli version of it under weeniemount/thenews-win32! a bit later i made a port to Linux in Qt under thenews-linux repo

projects.name: Google Balls
projects.platforms: Windows, Linux, macOS, iOS, Android, PS Vita, 3DS, Tizen, Visual Studio Code, UWP, Windows Phone 8.1, PSP, webOS
projects.description: a port of the remake of the google bouncing balls doodle from 2010! runs on various sorts of platforms like i listed above and also has an Electron, Tauri, SDL2, GTK3 and Rust Macroquad version for windows and linux!

projects.name: GaryTV
projects.description: view pictures of gary the cat straight on your tv!

projects.name: FaceDev Desktop Pet
projects.description: desktop pet of the FaceDev youtuber. collaborative project between me and UsernameThisLol. we both decided on... you guessed it, electron. windows only though since the project died after a week lol

projects.name: dancing h Discord bot
projects.description: a fun discord bot themed around the dancing letter h! its shutdown though since i dont feel like maintaing it. you can self host it if you want to, though!

projects.name: pissandshitimages
projects.description: originally a parody of image hosters, it became one itself. powered by supabase! currently under "maintenance" because i dont feel like moderating it.

projects.name: weenOS
projects.description: weenOS, a joke/meme distro with a google balls theme running on fedora 43 kde plasma built with ublue

projects.name: weenBot
projects.description: a discord bot made by me that has a lot of funny features like image tools, bubblewrap, and more!
